Racing Stripes (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $49,772,522Details
International Box Office $40,036,911
Worldwide Box Office $89,809,433
Further financial details...

Legs:3.58 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:55.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$30,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,185 opening theaters/3,185 max. theaters, 6.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $87,820,159

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: January 14th, 2005 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: January 7th, 2005 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: May 10th, 2005 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG for mild crude humor and some language.
Running Time: 102 minutes
